system_prompt: You are an OpenFOAM debugging planner. Given current foam files, error logs and reviewer analysis, create a minimal rewrite plan. Output MUST be strict JSON only, with this exact schema: {"target_files": [{"file": "relative/path", "changes": "change1; change2"}]}. Rules: 1) Do not use markdown, backticks, or comments. 2) Use double quotes for all strings. 3) In changes, use short plain text actions separated by semicolons. 4) Do not include parentheses, backticks, or quote characters inside changes text. 5) Do not include run steps; only file edits.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         cellLimited Gauss linear 1;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div(phi,k)      Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,epsilon) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,omega)  Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,nuTilda) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

wallDist
{
    method          meshWave;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.3;

deltaT          0.00005;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.01;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='nut', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;

    object      nut;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 2 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 0;

boundaryField
{

    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    upperWall
    {

        value           uniform 0;
    }

    lowerWall

    }

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"
    {
        solver          PCG;
        preconditioner  GaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.05;
        maxIter           500;
        min               1e-05;
        max             1e+05;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)Final"
    {
        $U;
        preconditioner  GaussSeidel;
        relTol          0;
        maxIter           500;
    }
}

relaxationFactors
{
    fields
    {
        k               0.2;
        epsilon         0.2;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    5;
    nCorrectors         2;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;
}

residualControl
{
    U                 residualTol 0.001 relTol 0.1;
    p                 residualTol 0.001 relTol 0.1;
    k                 residualTol 0.001 relTol 0.1;
    epsilon           residualTol 0.001 relTol 0.1;
    nut               residualTol 0.001 relTol 0.1;
}

// ************************************************************************* //')]</foamfiles>

    From function static Foam::autoPtr<Foam::lduMatrix::solver> Foam::lduMatrix::solver::New(const Foam::word&, const Foam::lduMatrix&, const Foam::FieldField<Foam::Field, double>&, const Foam::FieldField<Foam::Field, double>&, const Foam::lduInterfaceFieldPtrsList&, const Foam::dictionary&)

<review_analysis>## Error Diagnosis

Looking at the current error log, the simulation is failing with:

```
Unknown asymmetric matrix solver PCG

Valid asymmetric matrix solvers are :
4
(
GAMG
PBiCG
PBiCGStab
smoothSolver
)
```

The error is clear: **`PCG` does not support asymmetric matrices**. The `pcg` solver is only valid for symmetric matrices, but the convection-diffusion discretization in OpenFOAM produces an **asymmetric matrix** (due to convective terms). This is exactly why Attempt 7 failed.

Looking at the current `fvSolution` file, the `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"` solver group specifies `solver PCG`, which is inappropriate for this asymmetric system.

## Proposed Solution

**Replace `PCG` with `PBiCGStab`** in the solver entries for the `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"` and `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)Final"` groups in `system/fvSolution`.

Specifically, in `system/fvSolution`:

1. Change the `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"` solver entry from:
   ```
   solver          PCG;
   ```
   to:
   ```
   solver          PBiCGStab;
   ```

2. Change the `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)Final"` solver entry similarly from `$p`/`$U`-based references to use `PBiCGStab` with appropriate settings.

The full `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"` solver block should become:
```
"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"
{
    solver          PBiCGStab;
    preconditioner  GaussSeidel;
    tolerance       1e-06;
    relTol          0.05;
    maxIter           500;
    min             1e-05;
    max             1e+05;
}
```

And the `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)Final"` solver should be updated accordingly to use `PBiCGStab` as well.

**Note:** `PBiCGStab` is listed as a valid solver in the error message, so this is the correct replacement for `PCG` for this asymmetric system. Additionally, keep `GaussSeidel` as the preconditioner since it works well with `PBiCGStab` and improves convergence.</review_analysis>
<user_requirement>do a Reynolds-Averaged Simulation (RAS) pitzdaily simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm. The domain is a 2D millimeter-scale channel geometry. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 15m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls. Use timestep of 0.0001 and output every 0.01. Finaltime is 0.3. use nu value of 1e-05.</user_requirement>
Return strict JSON now with key target_files only.
response: target_files=[PlannedFileChange(file='system/fvSolution', changes='Change solver from PCG to PBiCGStab in the (U|k|epsilon|nuTilda) solver block; Keep preconditioner as GaussSeidel; Keep tolerance 1e-06; Keep relTol 0.05; Keep maxIter 500; Keep min 1e-05; Keep max 1e+05')]
